c.d: Number and diversity of collage templates and layouts available in the app.
User interface simplicity and intuitiveness for creating collages quickly.
Range of photo editing tools such as filters, text addition, stickers, background removal, and AI-powered enhancements.
Supported operating systems and devices (iOS, Android, Web, Windows).
Cost to download and use the app, including free versions, subscriptions, and in-app purchases.
Use of AI technology for automatic collage generation, background removal, image enhancement, and template suggestions.
Options to share collages directly to social media, email, or messaging platforms.
